prestazioni: 6.75L N74B68 V12 twin-turbo engine: Replace OEM turbos with **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** billet wheel turbos (1.35 A/R, 88mm compressor, 76mm turbine) paired with **Precision Turbo & Engine 7675CEA** wastegates for 18 psi peak boost, supporting 750+ hp at 6,200 RPM with **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management (OEM ECU bypass via CAN bus integration).

Forced induction: **Vargas GCX-1200** intercooler kit (1200hp-rated, 4.5" core thickness, 100% aluminum construction) with **Mishimoto X-Line** silicone hoses (4-ply, reinforced with Kevlar) and **AEM 380LPH** in-tank fuel pump (dual setup) feeding **ID1700x** injectors (1700cc/min, ethanol-compatible) for E85 flex-fuel capability.

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP95** 8-speed transmission reinforced with **Sonnax Smart-Tech** valve body upgrades (shift speed reduced to 180ms) and **Peloquin LSD** 40% torque-bias differential. **AP Racing CP9669-3000** 6-piston calipers with **DBA 5000 Series** two-piece rotors (400mm front, 380mm rear) and **Ferodo DS3.1** pads for 1.2g braking performance.
estetica: Aero: **Vorsteiner V-RT Phantom VIII** widebody kit (carbon fiber, OEM-fitment) with **Rocket Bunny** front splitter (3D-milled aluminum, adjustable 3-stage dive planes) and **Seibon Carbon** GT-style rear diffuser (integrated **Aeromotions** active rear wing, 3-position adjustability: 0°, 12°, 25°).

Wheels: **HRE FF16** forged monoblock wheels (22x10.5" front, 22x12.5" rear, 5x130mm PCD) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (285/35R22 front, 325/30R22 rear) and **H&R** 30mm lowering springs (progressive-rate, 800 lb/in front, 700 lb/in rear) paired with **Bilstein B16 PSS10** coilovers (10-way damping adjustability).

Exterior: **3M Matte Pearl White** vinyl wrap (Satin Series, 200 micron) with **LuxuryTINT** ceramic coating (9H hardness, 10-year warranty). **Lumma CLR Phantom VIII** carbon fiber hood (OEM-spec latches, active heat extraction vents) and **Novitec** side skirts (painted in **Bentley Satin Grey**, contrast-matched to **Rolls-Royce Starlight Headliner** with 1,600 fiber-optic strands).
